archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast (Authority, Clarity, Truth) blended with Retro-Futurism for Agent Execution details

headings.usage: H1, H2, H3, marketing pages, auth pages, empty state titles. Gives an academic, authoritative, 'old money tech' feel.

body.usage: Chat messages, standard UI text, buttons, inputs.

mono.usage: Agent execution details, logs, citations, tool badges, timestamps, step statuses. Brings the retro-futurism 'terminal' transparent vibe.

spacing_and_layout.general: Generous spacing. p-6 or p-8 for cards. Containers must have padding to prevent text collision.
spacing_and_layout.auth_page: Tetris grid. Split screen with a visually rich left side (image + grain) and clean form on the right. Form centered with high padding.
spacing_and_layout.dashboard: High Density Grid. Left sidebar (260px) for threads/documents. Center for chat. Right-drawer (or expandable inline console) for Execution Details.
spacing_and_layout.execution_drawer: Retro-terminal feel. Dense, monospace fonts, sharp 1px borders, step-by-step tree visualization for the agent's plan.

surface_strategies.cards: Grid Borders (Technical look). 1px solid borders, no soft shadows. Sharp and objective.
surface_strategies.headers: Glassmorphism with a sharp 1px bottom border to separate from content. bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl.
surface_strategies.agent_terminal: Retro-Futurism. Deep dark background (even in light mode, maybe a very dark slate) for the execution drawer to emphasize 'under the hood' processing, or crisp technical borders.

components.buttons: Sharp corners or rounded-sm max. No pill shapes for primary actions to maintain the authoritative/technical feel. Hover states must have clear high-contrast shifts.
components.badges: Tool badges must use Mono font, uppercase, tight tracking. e.g., tracking-[0.05em].
components.inputs: Shadcn default but customized to 0px or 2px border radius. Focus states must use ring-1 ring-primary.
components.chat_messages: User messages: subtly tinted background. Agent messages: transparent background, with inline citations appearing as small super-script or interactive mono-font brackets [1].
components.document_dropzone: Dashed border, generous p-12. Hover state background tint change.

motion_and_interaction.general: Crisp and fast. No slow fades.
motion_and_interaction.hover: Translate-y-[-1px] with shadow-sm for interactive document cards.
motion_and_interaction.agent_typing: Use a blinking cursor block (terminal style) rather than bouncing dots.
motion_and_interaction.execution_steps: Staggered entrance for agent plan steps as they are generated. Pulse animation on the 'processing' step.

media_and_images.empty_state_chat: https://images.pexels.com/photos/34283792/pexels-photo-34283792.jpeg (Research desk setup, use as subtle background or cropped feature in empty states)

accessibility.contrast: Strict APCA/WCAG AA compliance. Never use gray-on-gray for essential text.
accessibility.testing_attributes: All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='upload-dropzone', data-testid='chat-submit-button').

libraries.charts: recharts (if data visualization of execution timings is needed)

UNIVERSAL_GUIDELINES_FOR_MAIN_AGENT: Do not use generic centered layouts or simplistic gradients.
Use layered design elements with explicit z-index hierarchy.
DO NOT apply `transition: all`. Target specific properties.
DO NOT center align the app container in App.css.
Never use placeholder AI emojis for icons. Use lucide-react.
DO NOT use transparent backgrounds for dropdowns, select menus, or sticky headers.
Maintain the distinct visual separation between 'User Space' (Chat) and 'Agent Space' (Execution Details).
Install Google Fonts in index.html: Cormorant Garamond, IBM Plex Sans, JetBrains Mono.
